title: WPA Junior
subtitle: Protocol, Respect & Good Manners
alexander_desc: 12 missions on diplomacy, respect & wise leadership
certificate_body: This certifies that the student has successfully completed the WPA Junior educational modules.
parent_note_body: This module is an educational tool for respectful behavior, communication and digital manners. It does not collect personal data and does not replace parental or professional guidance.
safety_note_body: Children under 13 should use this module with a parent or teacher.
break_reminder: Take a break and rest your eyes. 🌿
disclaimer_alex: This is an educational game inspired by historical figures and themes. It is not a complete historical reconstruction. Focus is on wisdom, diplomacy, respect and cultural understanding.
disclaimer_goce: This is an educational and values-based game inspired by a historical figure. Focus is on education, integrity, dignity and courage without hatred, not on political agitation.
